subject: Q3 Financial Report
body: Please find the attached Q3 financial report for your review before the Friday sync.

subject: CRITICAL: Database 04 Down
body: Production database 04 is unresponsive. Immediate action required.

subject: Pizza Friday!
body: We are ordering from Luigi's this Friday. Let me know your slice preferences by noon.

subject: 90% OFF Premium Antivirus
body: Don't miss out on our summer sale! Secure your PC today for pennies.

subject: Client meeting shifted
body: The Acme Corp meeting is moved to Wednesday at 2 PM. Please update your schedules.

subject: Action Required: Open Enrollment
body: Benefits open enrollment closes in 24 hours. Please submit your forms.

subject: Quick question on the API
body: Hey, do you remember which endpoint handles user authentication? Slack me when you can.

subject: This Week in Marketing
body: Top 5 trends you need to know about SEO optimization this month.

subject: All Hands Meeting Update
body: Tomorrow's all hands will feature a special guest. Be there at 10 AM.

subject: Meme of the day
body: Thought you would appreciate this comic about graphic designers. Haha!

subject: URGENT: Contract Signature Needed
body: The vendor is waiting for your signature on the NDA. We will lose the deal if not signed by 5 PM.

subject: Pull Request #402 Approved
body: Your pull request has been approved by @senior_dev and is ready to merge.

subject: 10x your pipeline
body: We have exclusive leads in your territory. Let's schedule a 10 minute call.

subject: Elevator maintenance
body: The east wing elevator will be out of service tomorrow between 1 PM and 3 PM.

subject: Drinks after work?
body: A few of us are heading to the pub at 6. You in?

subject: Sev 1: Application Crashing
body: Our entire team is getting 500 errors when logging in. We need support on this immediately.

subject: Your PTO Request is Approved
body: Your time off from Nov 10 to Nov 15 has been approved by your manager.

subject: You have 1.5 BTC waiting!
body: Verify your wallet phrase to claim your airdrop immediately.

subject: Budget Revisions Required
body: I need you to cut 10% from the Q4 marketing budget before the board meeting tomorrow morning.

subject: Next month's read
body: We've decided on 'Dune' for next month. Happy reading!

subject: Code Review
body: Can you take a look at my branch when you have a spare moment today?

subject: Mandatory Security Training Due
body: Your annual compliance training expires in 3 days. Complete it to avoid network lock-out.

subject: Exciting Opportunity at MegaCorp
body: I came across your profile and think you'd be a great fit for our Lead Engineer role.

subject: Join our free webinar tomorrow
body: Learn how to leverage AI in your daily workflows. Register now.

subject: 1:1 Reschedule
body: Let's move our 1:1 from Tuesday to Thursday at 11 AM.

subject: Lost keys
body: Did anyone leave a set of Honda keys in the 3rd floor kitchen?

subject: Invoice 40592 Available
body: Your monthly invoice for user licenses is attached. Auto-pay will process on the 1st.

subject: Your Tuesday morning trip with Uber
body: Here is your receipt for your ride to the airport.

subject: Draft press release needs approval
body: We need your final sign-off on this press release by noon before it hits the wire.

subject: Morning Run
body: Meeting at the park entrance at 6 AM tomorrow for a 5k. Join if you want!

subject: Ticket #8990 Updated
body: Our engineers have deployed a patch. Please verify if the issue is resolved on your end.

subject: Help us reach our goal
body: Your $10 can provide clean water. Donate today.

subject: Question regarding Q2 slide deck
body: Can you explain the discrepancy on slide 14? Need an answer before the investor call at 2 PM.

subject: Free Muffin with Large Coffee
body: Show this email at checkout today only!

subject: Out of Office
body: I will be on vacation from June 1-14 with limited access to email.

subject: Holiday Party RSVPs due
body: Please let us know if you will be attending the winter gala plus one.

subject: AWS Budget Alert: Exceeded 90%
body: Your AWS account has exceeded 90% of its $5000 budget for the month.

subject: Updated Employee Handbook
body: Please review the new remote work policies detailed in the attached handbook.

subject: Happy Birthday!
body: Wishing you a great birthday today! There's cake in the breakroom.

subject: You appeared in 14 searches this week
body: See who is looking at your profile on LinkedIn.

subject: Mandatory Team Dinner
body: We are hosting the new clients at Morton's Steakhouse tonight at 7 PM. Your attendance is required to answer technical questions.

subject: Weekend BBQ
body: Hey team, hosting a BBQ at my place this Saturday. Completely optional, bring the kids!

subject: URGENT: Password Expiring in 2 Mins
body: Your Office365 password expires in 2 minutes. Click this external link to secure your account immediately or lose access.

subject: Funny article I found
body: Read this piece in the NYT about dogs in the workplace. Gave me a good laugh.

subject: URGENT: Need you to pick up cupcakes
body: It's Dave's work anniversary today! I forgot the cupcakes. Can you URGENTLY run to the bakery before 10 AM?

subject: URGENT: Confidential Offer
body: We are a stealth startup funded by a16z looking for a CTO. We need to speak today. Massive equity.

subject: EMERGENCY!
body: Honey, I can't find the recipe for the thanksgiving turkey. Call me right now!

subject: Re: Cold Outreach - Let's talk Enterprise License
body: Your sales rep reached out. We are actually interested in purchasing 10,000 seats. Can we do a pilot?

subject: Can you do me a favor?
body: Are you at your desk? I'm in a meeting and need you to buy 5 Apple gift cards for a client presentation immediately.

subject: URGENT: I messed up the production DB
body: Please don't tell the boss yet, but I think I just dropped the users table. Can you help me restore the backup RIGHT NOW?

subject: Accepted: Project Kickoff
body: The CEO has accepted your invitation for the Project Kickoff on Monday at 9 AM.

subject: Declined: 1:1 Sync
body: Your manager has declined the 1:1 sync on Tuesday at 3 PM. Note: 'Swamped this week, let's do async'.

subject: We need to talk.
body: Come to my office as soon as you see this.

subject: URGENT: Where is the bathroom?
body: It's my first day and I am lost on the 4th floor. Please help.

subject: FINAL NOTICE: Tax Audit Scheduled
body: You have an outstanding tax balance. An auditor will arrive at your workplace unless you pay the attached bitcoin invoice.

subject: School called - Timmy is sick
body: Timmy threw up at school. I'm stuck in court, can you leave work now to pick him up?

subject: Holiday greetings
body: We just wanted to wish everyone a Merry Christmas and a happy new year. Thanks for your hard work.

subject: Subpoena compliance
body: We are legally required to preserve all your emails regarding the Enron account. Do not delete anything.

subject: Puppy in the breakroom!
body: Sarah brought her new golden retriever puppy to the office today. Come say hi!

subject: Your expense report was rejected
body: You cannot expense a $400 bottle of wine for a 'team lunch'. Please revise and resubmit by EOD or it comes out of your paycheck.

subject: FIRE DRILL IN 5 MINUTES
body: This is not a test. Please proceed calmly to the nearest exit.

subject: Urgent: 5 Dinners you can make in 10 minutes
body: You are busy, so we urgently compiled these fast recipes for you.

subject: Coffee chat tomorrow?
body: The CEO has a sudden 15-minute gap tomorrow at 10 AM and wants to hear your thoughts on the new AI initiative. Free?

subject: Order #409-1123-99 Shipped to Kansas
body: Your order for a $2000 MacBook has shipped. If you didn't order this, call this 1-800 number immediately to cancel.

subject: Scheduled maintenance
body: GitLab will be down for 5 minutes at midnight this Saturday for patching.

subject: Let's play golf
body: I'm in town this weekend. Would love to hit the links and informally discuss renewing our contract.

subject: Review my presentation
body: I know it's late, but can you proofread this deck before my 8 AM pitch to the board tomorrow?

subject: Urgent: Giving Tuesday is almost over!
body: There is still time to make your tax-deductible donation before midnight.

subject: Leg day moved
body: Trainer pushed our session to Thursday at 5 PM. Does that work for your calendar?

subject: New Policy on Email Triage AI
body: Please be advised that all incoming emails are now being parsed by a new reasoning-based AI agent to ensure optimal productivity.
